title: Number Of Valid Words For Each Puzzle
hints: Since puzzle letters are distinct and limited to 7, focus on the unique set of characters in each word rather than the words themselves.
Convert each word into a bitmask of its unique characters. A word matches a puzzle if its mask is a subset of the puzzle's mask and includes the puzzle's first letter.
Precompute counts for all possible 7-bit masks. For each puzzle, iterate through its 2^6 subsets to sum the precomputed counts of valid word masks.
